message:
refactor(workflows): extract wait condition execution to wait_execution.rs [ft-c45am]

Extracts Wait Condition Execution section (~599 lines) including
WaitConditionResult, WaitConditionOptions, WaitConditionExecutor,
heuristic_idle_check, and truncate_for_log into workflows/wait_execution.rs.

mod.rs: 18,893 → 18,296 lines.
